title: Based on my resume, write a summary for my Indeed. Mention my desire to pursue librarianship as a career and currently a…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Based on my resume, write a summary for my Indeed. Mention my desire to pursue librarianship as a career and currently attending FSU

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As an enthusiastic and driven individual, I am eager to pursue a career in librarianship. With my strong background in education and diverse experiences within libraries, I am confident in my ability to excel in this field. Currently attending Florida State University, I am actively seeking opportunities to gain valuable experience and skills to further my career in librarianship. With a passion for research and a commitment to providing exceptional service to library patrons, I am excited for the opportunity to make a positive impact within the field.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Work Experience
Certified Pharmacy Technician
CVS Health Retail - Tallahassee, FL
September 2021 to Present
• Accurately filled more than 400 prescriptions with high accuracy in compliance with all legal, quality,
and regulatory standards daily, facilitating excellent patient care in pharmacy settings.
• Assisted in maintaining the accuracy of registered medication records by verifying details of
prescriptions and the total of medication dispensed with high accuracy.
• Provided support to pharmacists by taking part in customer service related activities and performing
minor clerical duties in accordance with State requirements.
• Maintained confidentiality of patient records and personal information as well as adhering to HIPAA
requirements, upholding ethical and professional standards.
• Participated in regular training sessions and continuing education courses to stay current with updates
to medications, regulations, and best practices in pharmacy settings.
• Demonstrated efficiency in retrieving prescription medications and entering prescription orders into
computer system, with minor error rate.
• Demonstrated proficiency in utilizing computer software systems, including entering prescription
orders, verifying insurance, and managing inventory to facilitate workflow.
Part Time Lab Assistant, Chemistry
Miami Dade College - Miami, FL
March 2020 to September 2020
• Performed weekly setup, maintenance, and break-down of chemistry lab including organization of
experimental materials and cleaning of equipment, resulting in successful and safe completion of
scientific experiments
• Maintained an organized environment in the lab by organizing experimental materials and cleaning
equipment regularly, ensuring that all necessary materials and equipment were available and kept in
good working condition for efficient scientific experiments.
• Coordinated with Laboratory Manager and Faculty to ensure hazards were identified and safety
protocol was followed; monitored and documented daily lab activities to maintain a safe scientific learning
environment.
• Developed transferable skills in scientific research, laboratory safety, communication, and
collaboration, using my experience to help create an efficient working environment in the lab as well as
to contribute positively to the academic and scientific learning environment.
Brand Ambassador
CANDYTOPIA - Aventura, FL
November 2019 to March 2020
• Represented the CANDYTOPIA brand with joy, creativity, and integrity, providing exceptional customer
service and promoting the brand values while utilizing my skills as an actor to deliver engaging and
memorable performances.
• Outrageously entertained and engaged with audiences, utilizing my background in acting to deliver
sweetness beyond their wildest dreams while interacting with visitors and generating goodwill and repeat
business for the brand.
• Delivered outstanding improv and generated audience participation, using my improvisational and
performance skills to create magical moments and making visitors feel celebrated and joyous.
• Worked seamlessly with other brand ambassadors as part of a team, as well as independently,
utilizing my communication, collaboration, and leadership skills to sustain a positive and productive work
environment.
• Relied on my internal motivation and work ethic to deliver the best performance on every shift, drawing
upon my acting skills to maintain high standards and providing exceptional attention to detail.
• Struck a pose and enjoyed the attention, knowing that visitors would be photographing and posting on
social media, positively promoting the CANDYTOPIA brand to a wider audience, while ensuring that my
background in acting created exceptional stage presence and helped me deliver exceptional customer
service.
Part Time Tutor, English and Communication
Miami Dade College - Miami, FL
November 2019 to February 2020
• Served as a role model and motivated students to achieve, and assisted with their academic needs
by providing guidance, support, and instruction in a friendly and professional manner, setting a positive
example and improving student retention and success rates.
• Attended all tutor trainings and required meetings to stay current with tutoring best practices, and to
improve one-on-one instructional skills, customer service, and communication skills, contributing to the
overall quality of the tutoring program.
• Completed tutoring reports accurately and in a timely manner, documenting student progress and
goals, and contributing to the collaboration and communication between the student, the tutor, and any
academic resource departments.
• Monitored student progress by tracking academic performance and identifying areas of concern, and
developing individualized strategies and goals to improve academic outcomes.
• Guided students to use the educational software at the labs through steps, tips, and demonstrations,
improving student engagement and supporting hands-on learning.
• Performed other duties as assigned with a positive and flexible approach, contributing to the efficient
and effective operation of the tutoring program, and adapting to the needs of the program and students.
Weekender
Chubbies Shorts - Aventura, FL
June 2019 to October 2019
• Restocked the merchandise floor regularly, ensuring that all shelves and displays were fully stocked
with products to meet customer demands and improve sales.
• Processed in-store orders and returns/exchanges for customers promptly, accurately, and effectively,
ensuring customer satisfaction and loyalty by handling any issues in a positive and professional manner
• Opened/closed the store for the day, following established protocols and procedures, and contributing
to a positive work environment by reinforcing high-quality standards and reducing errors and accidents.
• Promoted products to customers with a professional and customer-focused approach, ensuring that
customers were informed and educated about the features of our products so that they could make
informed purchase decisions.
• Ensured a hospitable shopping experience for customers, offering assistance with product selection
and addressing any concerns or questions that they may have had to improve customer satisfaction,
retention, and loyalty.
• Developed transferable skills in customer service, merchandising, sales, and retail operations, building
positive relationships with customers and contributing to the overall success of the store.
Crew Member
Chipotle Mexican Grill - Miami, FL
July 2018 to June 2019
• Prepared various salsas before opening, ensuring that they were fresh, tasty, and ready for service,
playing a crucial role in the quality of the dishes served.
• Set up the line with food prior to opening by ensuring that all necessary ingredients and supplies
were stocked and organized, streamlining the opening process and maintaining efficiency throughout
the workday.
• Tidied up the back of the house, creating a safe and sanitary work environment, reducing the risk of
accidents and maintaining a high level of cleanliness and organization.
• Took orders on the line, ensuring that customers received their food accurately, efficiently, and with
excellent customer service.
• Maintained great customer service/guest experience by attending to customer inquiries and concerns
with professionalism, care, and attention, improving the overall guest experience and generating positive
reviews.
• Worked collaboratively with fellow team members in a fast-paced environment, improving teamwork
dynamics while keeping a high degree of focus on quality and efficiency.
• Developed skills in multitasking, time management, customer service, and teamwork, building on the
overall quality of the establishment’s work culture and efficiency.
Student Intern
Florida International University - Miami, FL
August 2016 to June 2017
• Cataloged metadata to accurately describe library items and applied subject headings and metadata
to improve searchability and access for patrons
• Assisted in the coordination and execution of library events and activities by working closely with other
staff members, ensuring that all logistical details were taken care of
• Prepared the conference room for meetings and calls by making sure that all necessary equipment
was present and accounted for, such as projectors and conference phones, creating a productive and
professional environment for all meetings and calls taking place in the library
• Contributed to a team that maintained an online censorship database by researching and documenting
instances of censorship and intellectual freedom issues
• Gained a deeper understanding of the importance of intellectual freedom and open access to
information as an integral part of the modern library landscape
• Worked closely with experienced library professionals to learn and develop skills in librarianship, project
management, teamwork, and communication
• Developed transferable skills and knowledge such as project management, teamwork, and
communication that will be valuable in any future career.
Education
Master of Science in Information Science
Florida State University - Tallahassee, FL
August 2023 to September 2025
Bachelor of Science in Anthropology
Florida State University - Tallahassee, FL
August 2020 to May 2023
Associate in Arts (AA) in Chemistry
Miami Dade College - North Miami Beach, FL
August 2018 to May 2020
Skills
• Bilingual
• Customer Service
• MS Office Suite
• Metadata Archiving
• Laboratory Experience
• Tutoring
• Writing Skills
• Data Analysis
• Pharmacy Technician Experience
Languages
• Haitian Creole - Fluent
• English - Fluent
• French - Intermediate
Certifications and Licenses
Registered Pharmacy Technician
January 2022 to December 2022
State certification from the Florida Department of Health.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As a Certified Pharmacy Technician with CVS Health Retail, I have a proven track record of accurately filling more than 400 prescriptions daily while upholding ethical and professional standards. Currently attending Florida State University for my Master of Science in Information Science, I bring a diverse skill set to any role. I have expertise in lab assistance, tutoring, and brand ambassadorship, and extensive experience in customer service, data analysis, and metadata archiving. Additionally, I am bilingual in Haitian Creole and English, fluent in French and skilled in MS Office Suite. I am a registered Pharmacy Technician certified by the Florida Department of Health.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Based on my resume, write a summary for my Indeed. Mention my desire to pursue librarianship as a career and currently attending FSU

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As a Certified Pharmacy Technician at CVS Health Retail and a student at Florida State University pursuing a Master of Science in Information Science, I am passionate about developing my skills in librarianship and the broader field of information science. With a proven track record of excellence in customer service, data analysis, metadata archiving, lab assistance, and tutoring, I bring a diverse skill set to any role. I am fluent in Haitian Creole and English, and intermediate in French. Seeking opportunities to gain valuable experience and contribute to the field of librarianship, I am excited to apply my skills and knowledge to a fulfilling career.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As a skilled Certified Pharmacy Technician at CVS Health Retail and a dedicated graduate student enrolled in the Master of Science in Information Science program at Florida State University, I am motivated to pursue a fulfilling career path in librarianship. I possess a diverse range of skills and experience in customer service, data analysis, metadata archiving, lab assistance, and tutoring, among others. Additionally, being fluent in Haitian Creole and English, and intermediate in French, has allowed me to communicate effectively with diverse audiences. With a strong commitment to professional excellence and a demonstrated track record of success, I am eager to bring a collaborative and dedicated mindset to your organization and contribute meaningfully to the field of librarianship.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Make me sound more professional and marketable to future employers

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: As a highly skilled and driven individual with extensive experience in various fields, I bring a versatile skill set and an unwavering dedication to any role I undertake. Coupled with my diverse experience, my ongoing education in the field of information science and a strong desire to pursue librarianship make me a valuable candidate for any organization seeking a dedicated professional who is passionate about contributing positively to their team. With a proven track record of excellence in customer service, tutoring, data analysis, metadata archiving, lab assistance, and brand ambassadorship, my attention to detail coupled with my ability to communicate effectively and fluently in Haitian Creole, English, and French, will be invaluable to any organization seeking to enhance their services across multiple audiences. With a positive and proactive mindset, I am motivated to leverage my skills and experience towards making a meaningful impact and contributing to the success of any employer I endeavor to work with, while advancing my career in the field of librarianship.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I am a versatile, dedicated, and highly skilled professional with diverse experience and ongoing education in information science. I bring a proven track record of excellence in customer service, tutoring, data analysis, metadata archiving, lab assistance, and brand ambassadorship, with strong communication skills in Haitian Creole, English, and French. I am passionate about contributing positively to any organization seeking to enhance their services, advance their mission, and succeed in the industry. I am motivated to leverage my skills and experience towards making a meaningful impact while pursuing my career in librarianship.
